originalTitle: Severe flooding kills 66 in Kenya, as heavy rains continue
title: Severe flooding kills 66 in Kenya, as heavy rains continue
content: Eleven people were rescued overnight after a minibus taxi got stuck in rising floodwaters in Nairobi.

originalTitle: Ugandan opposition leader goes abroad after two months in hiding
title: Ugandan opposition leader goes abroad after two months in hiding
content: Uganda's military chief has said Bobi Wine is wanted "dead or alive", although some ministers have denied he is being sought.

originalTitle: Will Trump help or hinder Zimbabwe's white farmers in their compensation battle?
title: Will Trump help or hinder Zimbabwe's white farmers in their compensation battle?
content: They have engaged a lobbying firm with close ties to the US president to argue their case.

originalTitle: Ukraine eyes money and tech in return for Middle East drone support
title: Ukraine eyes money and tech in return for Middle East drone support
content: Ukraine leader previously said advisers were sent to Qatar, UAE, and Saudi Arabia to help thwart Iranian drone attacks.

originalTitle: What is force majeure and why are some Gulf countries invoking it?
title: What is force majeure and why are some Gulf countries invoking it?
content: Several Gulf energy producers have declared force majeure on oil and gas shipments after disruptions to shipping.

originalTitle: Oscars 2026 live: Sinners, One Battle After Another race for Academy gold
title: Oscars 2026 live: Sinners, One Battle After Another race for Academy gold
content: Sinners enters tonight's race with a record 16 Academy Award nominations, including for Best Picture and Best Director.

originalTitle: BBC visits aftermath of Israeli strike on Lebanon that killed family as IDF targets Hezbollah
title: BBC visits aftermath of Israeli strike on Lebanon that killed family as IDF targets Hezbollah
content: A relative tells BBC those killed were civilians and not Hezbollah operatives, but the Israel Defense Forces says it was targeting "terrorist infrastructure".

originalTitle: Zelensky accuses EU allies of 'blackmail' in oil pipeline row
title: Zelensky accuses EU allies of 'blackmail' in oil pipeline row
content: Volodymyr Zelensky says restoring the flow of Russian oil via Ukraine into the EU would be like lifting sanctions on Russia.

title: Severe flooding kills 66 in Kenya, as heavy rains continue

originalTitle: Spurs answer Tudor's call with show of fight in the face of crisis
title: Spurs answer Tudor's call with show of fight in the face of crisis
content: Spurs interim coach Igor Tudor told his players they could "cry or fight". BBC Sport chief football writer Phil McNulty saw a display of defiance to draw at Liverpool.

originalTitle: Rooney calls for Carrick to get permanent Man Utd job
title: Rooney calls for Carrick to get permanent Man Utd job
content: Wayne Rooney calls on Manchester United to give Michael Carrick the manager's job after boosting their hopes of Champions League qualification.

originalTitle: Have Old Firm wrested title momentum away from Hearts?
title: Have Old Firm wrested title momentum away from Hearts?
content: After wins for Celtic and Rangers and a defeat for leaders Hearts, what next in the captivating Scottish Premiership title race?
